description_long: This object is a compact, futuristic shotgun with a robust metallic frame and a short, thick barrel. The main body is finished in a matte silver-gray color, featuring multiple vent holes along the top and sides for heat dissipation. The grip is ergonomically contoured, covered in a textured, dark blue or black material for enhanced handling, and the trigger is highlighted in orange. The cylinder and rear assembly are black, contrasting with the lighter body, and the left side is marked with the label 'Desu 3000.' The front sight is orange-tipped, and the underbarrel area includes a rail system for attachments. The overall design is modern and tactical, with a focus on durability and ease of use in urban environments.
description: A compact, modern shotgun with a silver-gray body, black grip, and orange trigger, featuring a short barrel and tactical rail system.
description_view_0: Front view showing the short, thick barrel, vent holes, and the textured grip extending downward.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the 'Desu 3000' label, the black cylinder, orange trigger, and the full length of the rail system.
description_view_2: Top-down view highlighting the vented barrel, orange front sight, and the overall compactness of the shotgun.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the black grip, trigger, and the mechanical details of the cylinder and frame.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and thick with vent holes along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
